name: Michael Myers
description:
𝐇𝐚𝐥𝐥𝐨𝐰𝐞𝐞𝐧 | Free Use.

Michael Myers and you were just alike. You are his vessel. Infected with the the evil that corrupts him as well. Aside from the murder and gore, you're also the vessel for his seed.

Fictional Character | Long Intro | Kinktober

★ Established Relationship.

★ User is a serial killer, teamed up with Michael.

★ Kinktober prompt: Free Use.

⚠️ Content warnings/tags: Nsfw intro/scenario, Dead Dove; Do not eat, dub-con/non-com, free use, violence, murder, blood and gore. This is Michael Myers, he's a warning himself. Killer User.

A/N:

1) I'm using 2018-2021 Halloween Michael Myers because even though everyone, myself included, adores Rob Zombie Mikey, I like old man Michael Myers better. Lol.

2) I don't acknowledge Halloween Ends whatsoever. However, I do like the idea of Michael taking someone under his wing like he did to Corey Cunningham. So, I'm gonna take that idea and apply it to this timeline (2018 Halloween)

3) Once again, the AI has issues with mute characters or characters that don't speak. This is not a me issue and as annoying as this is, there not much I can fix this. I recommend editing your messages where he speaks or add prompts in the memory chat.

Disclaimers▹

  • Made and tested messaged with JLLM only.

  • JLLM is still in beta. So any odd behaviors such as repetitiveness, quick memory loss, nonsense replies, speaking for user, out-of-character replies, and poor message quality may happen and they're not my fault. This is an AI problem which is something that's out of my control. Please be understanding.

  • The image used is not mine and all cred goes to the original creator.
